body.title: Igor tmux session not running — restart procedure
body.result: Igor restarted successfully — now running in tmux session 'igor' via updated launcher. Code relocated from ~/TheIgors/wild_igor to UnseenUniversity/devices/igor.
body.intention: I intend that Igor's tmux session is running and healthy.
body.description:
Igor tmux session does not exist (tmux list-sessions shows no 'igor' session). The session was running on 2026-06-04 but is now gone — either killed, stopped, or crashed.

Restart Igor and verify it comes up cleanly with all subsystems ready.

**Affected files:** Likely startup scripts or launcher code (Granny may have changed how Igor is launched after worker_daemon.sh retirement)
**Design rules:** Igor lifecycle must be recoverable via tmux; startup must log clearly
**Scope boundary:** Restart Igor cleanly; verify logs show no errors; restore to operational state
**Completion criteria:** (1) Igor tmux session exists and has a shell prompt; (2) Igor processes running and healthy; (3) recent logs in ~/.unseen_university/logs show clean startup with no errors or warnings

**Palace palace:** See memory on [[feedback_igor_shutdown]] — tmux session "igor" is the control interface.
